features.name: Authentication (login/register/logout/me)
features.evidence: auth.ts has full CRUD with bcrypt, JWT in httpOnly cookies. AuthContext.tsx wires login/register/logout/logout. ProtectedRoute gates all dashboard routes.
features.recommended_next_step: Add input validation (zod) for email format and password strength.

features.name: Dashboard (KPIs, status wall, activity timeline)
features.evidence: dashboard.ts computes stats/agents/events from DB. DashboardPage.tsx fetches and renders KPIs, agent status tiles, event timeline. Routing is nested and correct.
features.recommended_next_step: Add error handling UI for failed fetches.

features.name: Company Management (list, create, switch)
features.evidence: GET/POST /companies in dashboard.ts. Company switcher in DashboardLayout and DashboardPage. AuthContext loads companies on mount.

features.name: Agents (list/create/update/delete)
features.evidence: agents.ts has full CRUD with authz checks (company membership verified). AgentsPage.tsx has 150-line component with create form, status controls, delete. PUT/DELETE now have authz checks (P0 fix applied).
features.recommended_next_step: Remove window.location.reload() after create, use optimistic state update.

features.name: Tasks (kanban CRUD, drag-drop)
features.evidence: tasks.ts has full CRUD. TaskBoard.tsx has kanban with 5 columns, drag-drop, create form, delete. Tasks route mounted in index.ts (P0 fix applied).

features.name: Calendar & Meetings
features.evidence: CalendarMeetings.tsx is a complete 77-line component with month grid and event form. BUT: calendar.ts only has POST /meetings -> {ok: true}. Frontend calls GET /api/calendar (wrong path). Route is not mounted in index.ts. Form onSubmit is e.preventDefault() only.
features.blockers: Missing calendar_events DB table, missing GET endpoint, route not mounted, form submission stub
features.recommended_next_step: Create calendar_events table, add GET /calendar and POST /calendar endpoints, mount route, wire form submission. T-01, T-02, T-06.

features.name: Chat & Journal
features.evidence: ChatJournal.tsx is complete (110 lines) with chat messages and journal tabs. BUT: chat.ts has POST /chat -> {ok: true} only (no GET). journal.ts: GET /journal -> {ok: true}. Neither route is mounted. No chat_messages or journal_entries tables exist.
features.blockers: Missing DB tables (chat_messages, journal_entries), routes not mounted, no GET for chat, no POST for journal
features.recommended_next_step: Create DB tables, implement GET/POST for both, mount routes. T-01, T-07, T-08.

features.name: File Hub
features.evidence: FileHub.tsx is complete (93 lines) with upload UI, file list, size formatting. BUT: files.ts has POST /files -> {ok: true} only. No file storage, no GET endpoint. Route not mounted.
features.blockers: No file storage layer, no files metadata table, route not mounted
features.recommended_next_step: Decide storage strategy (local vs cloud), create files table, implement GET/POST with multipart, mount route. T-01, T-09.

features.name: Org Chart
features.evidence: CompanyOrg.tsx renders hierarchical view (CEO -> Manager -> Agent). Fetches from /companies/:id/agents (reuses agents endpoint). Only shows AI agents, not real people/company_members.
features.blockers: No distinction between agents and human members. company_members table not exposed.
features.recommended_next_step: Either extend agents to include human roles or create dedicated members endpoint.

features.name: Company Settings
features.evidence: CompanySettings.tsx has company info form (name, goal) and member list. Save button shows fake toast. Member list shows companies[] instead of users. No PUT /companies/:id endpoint exists. Invite is alert().
features.blockers: No PUT companies endpoint, no dedicated members endpoint, members populated with wrong data
features.recommended_next_step: Implement PUT /companies/:id, GET /companies/:id/members, fix member population. T-04, T-05.

features.name: OpenClaw Connector
features.evidence: POST /connectors/openclaw is mounted and secured (webhook secret header check, companyId extraction, normalizeEvent). pollGateway returns [] (stub). No UI for configuration.
features.blockers: pollGateway is stub. OPENCLAW_WEBHOOK_SECRET must be set in env (not in repo).
features.recommended_next_step: Implement actual OpenClaw polling. Add webhook secret to deployment env vars.

features.name: Goals
features.evidence: goals table exists in DB (schema.ts line 67-75). No API routes. Dashboard.ts queries goals table for progress calc but no way to create/update goals from frontend.
features.recommended_next_step: Create goals CRUD API and connect to Dashboard or Company Settings.

features.name: Realtime Events
features.evidence: realtime.ts: GET /events returns empty string ''. Route not mounted. No SSE/WebSocket implementation.
features.blockers: No implementation, not mounted, not used by any frontend page
features.recommended_next_step: Either implement SSE/EventSource or remove the stub.

features.name: Data Queries (raw companies/events)
features.evidence: data.ts has GET /companies and GET /events. Now secured with authMiddleware (P0 fix). Only used by orphaned CompanyPanel.tsx and Sidebar.tsx (not rendered in app).
features.recommended_next_step: Remove if truly unused, or wire into overview dashboard components.
